content.explanation:
**E-mail Writing — Professional Emails:**

Email is the most common professional communication tool.
A good email = clear subject + professional tone + action point.

**EMAIL FORMAT:**
**To:** [recipient@email.com]
**CC:** [copy@email.com] (optional — for information copy)
**Subject:** [Clear and specific subject]

**Dear [Name] / Hello [Name] / Hi [Name] (based on formality),**

**Opening line:**
• Formal: "I hope this email finds you well."
• Semi-formal: "I wanted to follow up on our last discussion."
• Casual: "Quick update on the project!"

**Body:** Explain clearly in 2-3 short paragraphs.

**Action required:** "Could you please...?" / "Please review and revert by..."

**Closing:**
• Formal: "Best regards / Warm regards / Yours sincerely"
• Casual: "Thanks / Cheers / Best"

**[Your Name]**
**[Designation]**
**[Contact]**
rules: Subject: specific and informative — not just "Important" or "Hello"
Keep emails short: say only what is necessary
One email = one main purpose (do not combine 5 topics)
"Please find attached" = when sending a file
"Please revert by [date]" = Indian English for "reply by"
CC = For information | BCC = blind copy (recipient cannot see others)
Professional tone: avoid ALL CAPS (sounds like shouting)
content.memoryTrick:
**Email = STAR format:**
**S**ubject — specific
**T**one — professional
**A**ction — what you want done
**R**esponse — when you need it by

Also: Short emails get read; Long emails get ignored!

examples.hindi: Meeting reschedule के बारे में email लिखना।
examples.english: Subject: Request to Reschedule Monday Meeting

examples.hindi: मैं आपको project update देना चाहता हूँ।
examples.english: I am writing to give you a quick update on the project status.
Please find the attached file for your review.

examples.hindi: कल तक reply करने का अनुरोध है।
examples.english: Could you please respond by end of day tomorrow?

examples.hindi: मुझसे contact करने में संकोच न करें।
examples.english: Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

examples.hindi: समय पर reply करने के लिए धन्यवाद।
examples.english: Thank you for your prompt response.

mistakes.correct: Subject: Meeting Rescheduled to 3 PM on Friday
mistakes.why: Vague subjects are unprofessional — be specific about what the email is about

mistakes.wrong: I am mailing you to ask...
mistakes.correct: I am writing to inquire about...
mistakes.why: 'Mailing' is too casual — 'writing' is standard formal email language

mistakes.correct: Could you please process the request? / Please take the necessary action.
mistakes.why: 'Do the needful' is Indian English — internationally use clearer specific language

mistakes.correct: Could you please respond at your earliest convenience?
mistakes.why: 'Revert' = go back (not reply); 'ASAP' is informal — avoid in formal emails

speakingTips: Read good professional emails and notice how they open, explain, and close.
Practice: Write an email to your boss requesting 2 days of leave.
Tip: Always proofread your email once before hitting 'Send'.

vocabulary.example: Please see the attachment for details.
Add all recipients in the TO field.
Refer to the email thread below.
Mark the email as urgent if needed.
Please keep me in the loop.

practice.hindi: मैं आपको यह ईमेल इस विषय के बारे में लिख रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I am writing this email regarding the subject.
alternatives: this email is with respect to the matter.
practice.hint: I am writing this email regarding + subject

practice.hindi: कृपया मेरे ईमेल का जवाब दें।
मैं आपको फ़ाइल अटैच कर रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I am attaching the file to this email.
alternatives: i have enclosed the file with this email.
practice.hint: attaching / enclosing = अटैच कर रहा हूँ

practice.hindi: विषय: नई नीति के बारे में।
आशा करता हूँ कि आप अच्छे होंगे।
alternatives: i trust you are doing fine.
practice.hint: I hope you are well = professional email greeting

practice.hindi: अगर कोई सवाल है तो मुझसे संपर्क करें।
practice.english: If you have any questions, please contact me.
alternatives: for any queries, feel free to reach out.

practice.hindi: ईमेल में जानकारी ध्यान से पढ़ें।
practice.english: Please read the information in the email carefully.
alternatives: go through the email details carefully.

practice.hindi: कृपया इस मामले को जल्दी सुलझाएँ।
practice.english: Please resolve this matter at the earliest.

practice.hindi: आगे की जानकारी के लिए मुझसे मिलें।
मैं आपकी प्रतिक्रिया का इंतज़ार करूँगा।
practice.hint: await your response = आपके जवाब का इंतज़ार

practice.hindi: यह ईमेल सभी टीम सदस्यों को भेजा जा रहा है।
practice.english: This email is being sent to all team members.
alternatives: this mail is going to the entire team.
practice.hint: being sent = भेजा जा रहा है

practice.hindi: कृपया इस लिंक पर क्लिक करें।
आपकी टीम का प्रदर्शन सराहनीय है।
नमस्ते, आशा करता हूँ यह ईमेल आपको अच्छी हालत में मिले।
practice.english: Hello, I hope this email finds you in good health.
alternatives: greetings, i hope you are doing well.
practice.hint: I hope this email finds you = professional opener
